member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.DuplicateAllowingCompararer`1
member.summary: List sort comparer allowing duplicates. Normal comparer returns 0 if compared values are equal. This comparer returns 1 in this case.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.DuplicateAllowingCompararer`1.Compare(`0,`0)
member.summary: Main comparison method

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.DuplicateAllowingCompararer`1.Equals(`0,`0)
member.summary: Equality comparer newer shows true.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.DuplicateAllowingCompararer`1.GetHashCode(`0)
member.summary: GetHashCode metod. Required when Equals defined.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.StringAllowingDuplicateComparer
member.summary: Static string comparer allowing duplicates. Can be used to avoid multiple instance creation.

member.name: P:Qhta.TextUtils.StringAllowingDuplicateComparer.Instance
member.summary: Singular instance.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.StringATergoComparer
member.summary: Comparer for inverted strings.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringATergoComparer.Compare(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Main compare method

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringATergoComparer.Equals(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Equality comparer never shows true.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringATergoComparer.GetHashCode(System.String)
member.summary: GetHashCode metod. Required when Equals defined.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.CSVUtils
member.summary: Utilities to process CSV files

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.CSVUtils.SplitCSV(System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Split a line of CSV file into parts.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.CharPair
member.summary: A pair of characters. May be used to parse text.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.CharPair.#ctor(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Default constructor
member.param: first char
second char

member.name: P:Qhta.TextUtils.CharPair.Item1
member.summary: First char.

member.name: P:Qhta.TextUtils.CharPair.Item2
member.summary: Second char.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars
member.summary: A list of CharPairs

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.#ctor(System.Char[0:,0:])
member.summary: Constructor based on 2-dimension array of chars.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.op_Implicit(System.Char[0:,0:])~Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars
member.summary: Implicit conversion from a 2-dimension array of chars.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.op_Implicit(Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars)~System.Char[0:,0:]
member.summary: Implicit conversion to a 2-dimension array of chars

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.Add(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Add a pair of chars

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.Remove(System.Char,System.Char)
member.summary: Remove a pair of chars.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.TryGetItem2(System.Char,System.Char@)
member.summary: Try to get first char when second is known.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.PairedChars.TryGetItem1(System.Char,System.Char@)
member.summary: Try to get second char when first is known.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.StringListUtils
member.summary: A list of methods operating on list of strings.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringListUtils.IndexOf(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Finds a string in a list.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringListUtils.IsEqualOrMixed(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks whether both lists are equal or both contain the same elements in different order.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringListUtils.FindInclusions(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks in which positions the first list contains elements not found in the second list.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.StringsEqualityComparer
member.summary: A handy implementation of string equality comparer.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringsEqualityComparer.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringsEqualityComparer.#ctor(System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Constructor with explicit comparison.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringsEqualityComparer.Equals(System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: Maint compare method.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringsEqualityComparer.GetHashCode(System.String[])
member.summary: GetHashCode metod. Required when Equals defined.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils
member.summary: A bunch of string utility methods

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.NumberToText(System.Double)
member.summary: Changes a number to literal text using whole part and a rational fraction part.
member.param: The number to convert to text.
member.returns: The textual representation of the number.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.NumberToText(System.Int32)
member.summary: Changes a number to literal text.
member.param: The number to convert to text.
member.returns: The textual representation of the number.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.NumberToText(System.Int64)
member.summary: Changes a number to literal text.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.<M>$83DCAEA4A49BE8CF63655AB4D80E7F93
member.summary: Extension methods for string. All methods return null if the input string is null.
member.param: String to process.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Acronym
member.summary: Get a substring from the first characters of the string's words.
member.returns: The acronym of the string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.TitleCase(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Change string to title case. First letter tu upper, rest to lower case.
member.param: Determines whether all words should be treated separately.
member.returns: The string in title case.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.CamelCase
member.summary: Change first letter of each word to upper, rest to lower case.
member.returns: String with each word in camel case.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.SplitCamelCase
member.summary: Split camel-case string to array of words.
member.returns: Array of words from the camel-case string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.DeCamelCase
member.summary: Split camel-case string to words and return them as a string with words separated by spaces. Words in all upper-case are not changed, but other words are changed to title case.
member.returns: String with words separated by spaces.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Precede(System.String)
member.summary: Precedes a string with a prefix when string is not null.
member.param: Prefix to add to the string.
member.returns: String with the prefix added, or empty string if input is null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Attach(System.String)
member.summary: Attach a suffix to a string if string is not null.
member.param: Suffix to add to the string.
member.returns: String with the suffix added, or empty string if input is null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ContainsAt(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a string contains a substring at a specified position.
member.param: Substring to check for.
Index at which to check for the substring.
member.returns: True if the substring is found at the specified index, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ContainsAt(System.String,System.Int32,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks if a string contains a substring at a specified position using a specified comparison.
member.param: Substring to check for.
Index at which to check for the substring.
String comparison type to use.
member.returns: True if the substring is found at the specified index using the specified comparison, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ContainsBefore(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a string ends with a substring at a specified position
member.param: Substring to check for.
Index at which to check for the substring.
member.returns: True if the substring is found before the specified index, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ContainsBefore(System.String,System.Int32,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks if a string contains a substring at a specified position using explicit comparison using a specified comparison.
member.param: Substring to check for.
Index at which to check for the substring.
String comparison type to use.
member.returns: True if the substring is found before the specified index using the specified comparison, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsUpper
member.summary: Checks if a string contains only upper-case letters.
member.returns: True if the string contains only upper-case letters, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsAscii
member.summary: Checks if a string contains characters from space to ~.
member.returns: True if the string contains only ASCII characters, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsUnicode
member.summary: Checks if a string contains Unicode characters (i.e. with codes greater than 127)
member.returns: True if the string contains Unicode characters, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsLike(System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks the similarity of key to pattern. Pattern can contain '*' as wildcard replacing any sequence of remaining characters.
member.param: Pattern to match against.
String comparison type to use.
member.returns: True if the key matches the pattern, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsLike(System.String,System.String@,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Checks the similarity of key to pattern. Pattern can contain '*' as wildcard replacing any sequence of remaining characters. Output is set to found wildcard replacement in the key. If there are multiple wildcards in the pattern then returned contains multiple replacements joined with '*' separator.
member.param: Pattern to match against.
Output parameter that will contain the found wildcard replacement(s) in the key.
String comparison type to use.
member.returns: True if the key matches the pattern, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.MatchPatternParts_(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Helper method to match pattern parts with wildcards. Pattern parts are separated by wildcards. Wildcards can be at the beginning and end of the pattern. If there are wildcards then found wildcard replacements are added to the list.
member.param: List of pattern parts separated by wildcards.
Indicates if the pattern starts with a wildcard.
Indicates if the pattern ends with a wildcard.
List to store found wildcard replacements.
String comparison type to use.
member.returns: True if the pattern parts match the input string, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsLikeNumber(System.String,System.String@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Checks if a key text starts or ends with a number..
member.param: Pattern text containing '#' ad the beginning or end. The rest is a literal pattern
Literal text detected by pattern
Number parsed from the wildKey
member.returns: True if the key matches the pattern, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.IsValidUrl
member.summary: Check if URL is valid. Uses Regex.
member.returns: True if the URL is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ToUpperFirst
member.summary: Changes the first letter to uppercase. All others unchanged.
member.returns: String with the first letter in uppercase.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ToLowerFirst
member.summary: Changes the first letter to lowercase. All others unchanged.
member.returns: String with the first letter in lowercase.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.TrimParens(System.ValueTuple{System.Char,System.Char}[])
member.summary: Trims parentheses enclosing the text.
member.param: Array of character pairs representing enclosings.
member.returns: String with parentheses trimmed.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.TrimEnclosings(System.Char,System.Char,System.ValueTuple{System.Char,System.Char}[])
member.summary: Changes enclosing parens. Omits included enclosings.
member.param: The opening parenthesis character.
The closing parenthesis character.
Array of character pairs representing enclosings.
member.returns: String with specified enclosings trimmed.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.TrimDblQuotes
member.summary: Trim double quote characters enclosing the text.
member.returns: String with double quotes trimmed.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.SplitBy(System.Char,System.ValueTuple{System.Char,System.Char}[])
member.summary: Splits a text by character. Fragments enclosed by are not split.
member.param: The separator character.
Array of character pairs representing enclosings.
member.returns: Array of strings split by the separator, excluding enclosed fragments.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Find(System.Int32,System.Char,System.ValueTuple{System.Char,System.Char}[])
member.summary: Searches a text from position for a character. If not found then length of text is returned;
member.param: The starting index for the search.
The separator character to search for.
Array of character pairs representing enclosings.
member.returns: The index of the separator character or the length of the text if not found.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.FindMatch(System.Int32,System.Char,System.ValueTuple{System.Char,System.Char}[])
member.summary: Searches a text from position for a pair of character. If not found then length of text is returned;
member.param: The starting index for the search.
The opening separator character.
Array of character pairs representing enclosings.
member.returns: The index of the matching closing separator or the length of the text if not found.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.SubstringUntil(System.Char,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a substring at a specified position until a specified delimiter is found.
member.param: The delimiter character.
The starting index for the search.
member.returns: The substring from the starting index until the delimiter is found.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.SplitSpecial(System.Char,System.ValueTuple{System.Char,System.Char}[])
member.summary: Split text with delimiter omitting quotes
member.param: The delimiter character.
Array of character pairs representing enclosings.
member.returns: Array of strings split by the delimiter, excluding enclosed fragments.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.SubstringUntil(System.Char,System.Int32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Gets a substring between start and end positions, but untils a specified delimiter is found.
member.param: The delimiter character.
The starting position for the search.
The ending position of the found substring.
member.returns: The substring from the starting position until the delimiter is found.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.FindEndOfSentence(System.Int32,System.String[])
member.summary: Find a position of the end of the sentence using dot position which does not ends any known abbreviation.
member.param: The starting position for the search.
Array of known abbreviations.
member.returns: The position of the end of the sentence or -1 if not found.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceStart(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the beginning of the string when it starts with a specified text.
member.param: The string to be replaced at the start.
The string to replace with.
member.returns: The modified string if the start matches; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceStart(System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the beginning of the string when it starts with a specified text. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to be replaced at the start.
The string to replace with.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the start matches; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceEnd(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the end of the string when it ends with a specified text.
member.param: The string to be replaced at the end.
The string to replace with.
member.returns: The modified string if the end matches; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceEnd(System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the end of the string when it ends with a specified text. Uses a specified string comparison.
member.param: The string to be replaced at the end.
The string to replace with.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the end matches; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index for the specified characters count.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
The number of characters to search within.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string in a specified text. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index for the specified characters count. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
The number of characters to search within.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces the last occurence of the string searching in a specified text.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Replaces the last occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index and continuing towards the begining of the text.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Replaces the last occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index and continuing towards the begining of the text for the specified characters count.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
The number of characters to search within.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the last occurence of the string in a specified text. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index and continuing towards the begining of the text. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.ReplaceLast(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Replaces the first occurence of the string searching in a specified text starting from the specified index and continuing towards the begining of the text for the specified characters count. Uses a specific string comparison.
member.param: The string to search for.
The string to replace with.
The starting index for the search.
The number of characters to search within.
The string comparison type to use.
member.returns: The modified string if the search string is found; otherwise, the original string.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Shorten(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a string shortened by a specified character count.
member.param: The number of characters to remove from the end of the string.
member.returns: The shortened string if the input string is not null; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Pluralize
member.summary: Makes English plural form of the noun.
member.returns: The plural form of the noun if the input string is not null; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Singularize
member.summary: Makes English singular form of the noun.
member.returns: The singular form of the noun if the input string is not null; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.DecodeEscapeSeq
member.summary: Decodes escapes sequences: \\, \t, \r, \n, \s, \u
member.returns: The decoded string if the input string is not null; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.DecodeEscapeSeq_(System.Int32@)
member.summary: Helper method for . Decodes escape sequence at the specified position and moves the position to the end of the sequence.
member.param: The current position in the string. This will be updated to the end of the escape sequence.
member.returns: The decoded escape sequence if the input string is not null; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Duplicate(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a string by repeating the original string a specified number of times.
member.param: The number of times to repeat the string.
member.returns: The repeated string if the input string is not null; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.TrimEnd(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a string ends with a specified substring and if so - returns the string with this substring removed.
member.param: Substring to remove from the end of the string
member.returns: Trimmed string if the substring is found at the end, otherwise the original string

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.TrimStart(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a string starts with a specified substring and if so - returns the string with this substring removed.
member.param: Substring to remove from the start of the string
member.returns: Trimmed string if the substring is found at the start, otherwise the original string

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.StringUtils.<G>$34505F560D9EACF86A87F3ED1F85E448.Concat2(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Concatenates two strings with a separator between them. If any of both is empty of null - the other is returned.
member.param: The string to use as a separator.
The second string to concatenate.
member.returns: The concatenated string if both strings are not null or empty; otherwise, the non-null string.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.CharEquivalence
member.summary: Equivalence of Unicode chars.

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.CharEquivalence.Equivalence
member.summary: Replacement of Unicode characters to Latin text.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlock
member.summary: Definitions of Unicode characters blocks (not categories).

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockDef
member.summary: A definition of Unicode characters block.

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockDef.From
member.summary: Lowest character code.

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockDef.To
member.summary: Highest character code.

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockDef.Name
member.summary: Name of the character block.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockSpan
member.summary: Text span with recognized Unicode characters block.

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockSpan.Block
member.summary: Recognized Unicode character block

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeBlockSpan.Text
member.summary: Text within a block.

member.name: T:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeUtils
member.summary: A list of Unicode-based handy methods.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeUtils.SplitToScripts(System.String)
member.summary: Splits text to blocks of same script substrings.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeUtils.GetUnicodeBlock(System.Char)
member.summary: Gets a UnicodeBlock of a specified character.

member.name: M:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeUtils.GetUnicodeBlock(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a UnicodeBlock from UnicodeBlockDefinitions for a specific character code.

member.name: F:Qhta.TextUtils.UnicodeUtils.UnicodeBlockDefinitions
member.summary: Definitions of UnicodeBLocks with ranges of character codes.
